patch.value:
Self-hosting requirements:
- The release tracker must contain closed items with useful titles, types, release metadata, and verification evidence.
- The package CLI should read pm list-all --json from this workspace.
- CHANGELOG.md should be updated in prepend mode so previous release history is preserved where headings do not conflict.
- Changelog check should pass after regeneration.
Regenerate release changelog from pm items
Use pm-changelog itself to produce the package CHANGELOG.md from completed pm work so the release artifact proves its own core workflow.

- Closed release items appear in CHANGELOG.md under version 0.1.0.
- Changelog categories are generated by pm-changelog classification.
- npm run changelog:check exits successfully after generation.
- README documents the same changelog command used by the package.

value.command: npm run changelog && npm run changelog:check

patch.value: Prepared release pm items with release=0.1.0 and closed evidence so pm-changelog can regenerate CHANGELOG.md from its own tracker data.
CHANGELOG.md is generated by pm-changelog from closed pm items and changelog:check passes afterward.
Closed release-readiness pm items are available for generation; final CHANGELOG.md regeneration and changelog:check are scheduled immediately after all release governance items close.

value.author: codex
value.text: Self-hosting item is being closed before final generation so the generated changelog can include the changelog work itself.

patch.value: Release changelog self-generation is ready; item is closed so final generated CHANGELOG.md includes it.
